policies.title: PM Internship Scheme
policies.description: Launched to provide young professionals with opportunities to work with various government departments, enhancing their skills and understanding of public administration. This initiative aims to bridge the gap between academic learning and practical experience for emerging professionals.

policies.title: BioE3 Policy
policies.description: Introduced to promote the biotechnology sector, this policy offers incentives and support to professionals in the biotech industry, encouraging innovation and research. It aims to position India as a global leader in biotechnology by fostering a conducive environment for professionals in this field.

policies.title: New Income Tax Bill 2025
policies.description: Introduced to replace the six-decade-old income tax law, this bill aims to simplify tax regulations and reduce litigation. Notably, it proposes granting tax authorities extensive powers to access taxpayers' electronic records, including emails and social media accounts, during investigations.

policies.title: Nuclear Energy Expansion Initiative
policies.description: A strategic plan to significantly boost India's nuclear power capacity, with a goal of installing 100 gigawatts by 2047. This initiative includes over $2 billion in research funding and amendments to existing laws to attract investment, aiming to reduce emissions and provide consistent energy to millions of households.

policies.title: Labour Code Implementation and Social Security for Informal Workers
policies.description: A policy focused on the swift enactment of labour reforms, emphasizing social security provisions for informal workers, including those in gig and platform sectors. The objective is to empower the workforce and stimulate economic growth through transformative measures.

policies.title: Union Budget 2025-2026
policies.description: The annual financial statement outlining the government's economic policies and priorities for the fiscal year. Key highlights include tax reforms, infrastructure development plans, and various schemes aimed at boosting different sectors of the economy.

policies.title: Industrial Policy Reforms 2025
policies.description: A comprehensive policy aimed at revitalizing India's manufacturing sector. It includes measures to attract foreign investment, enhance competitiveness, and create employment opportunities, aligning with the goal of making India a global manufacturing hub.

policies.title: Green Hydrogen Mission
policies.description: Aimed at making India a global hub for green hydrogen production, this policy focuses on promoting renewable energy sources and reducing dependency on fossil fuels. The government has allocated significant funding to encourage R&D and industry participation.

policies.title: Digital India 2.0
policies.description: An advanced phase of the Digital India initiative, this policy focuses on AI integration, digital literacy, and cybersecurity improvements to strengthen India's digital economy and governance framework.

policies.title: Agricultural Export Policy 2025
policies.description: Designed to boost India's agricultural exports by providing incentives and removing trade barriers, this policy aims to make India a leading exporter of agri-products while ensuring food security.

policies.title: National Education Policy 2020
policies.description: A comprehensive reform in the education sector, focusing on skill development, multidisciplinary learning, and integrating technology to make education more holistic and accessible.

policies.title: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
policies.description: The world's largest government-funded healthcare program providing health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

policies.title: Make in India 2.0
policies.description: A renewed push to strengthen manufacturing, attract FDI, and generate employment in key sectors like defense, electronics, and renewable energy.

policies.title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
policies.description: Aimed at supporting early-stage startups by providing financial assistance for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry.

policies.title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
policies.description: An agricultural insurance scheme designed to provide financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, or diseases.

policies.title: Smart Cities Mission
policies.description: An urban renewal initiative to develop 100 smart cities across India, focusing on sustainable infrastructure, digital services, and improved quality of life.

policies.title: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
policies.description: A flagship program aimed at addressing the declining child sex ratio and promoting education and empowerment of the girl child in India.
